title: coronilla valentina subsp. pentaphylla
intro: Coronilla valentina subsp. pentaphylla, also known as Pentaphylla valentina, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coronilla valentina subsp. pentaphylla are attributed to its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
